explicit_text: I was born in Monte di Procida, Italy, in 1965. It's a small coastal town near Naples where my father lived all his life with his family. Growing up there shaped much of my early life before I decided to move to the United States in 1987.
implicit_text: I was born in a small coastal town near Naples, Italy, in 1965. It's where my father lived all his life with his family. Growing up there shaped much of my early life before I decided to move to the United States in 1987.

explicit_text: Italy is where my roots are. I was born there in 1965, and my father was born and raised near Naples, in Monte di Procida. I left Italy in 1987 at age 22 to start a new life in the United States, but Italy will always be my homeland.
implicit_text: My roots are in the country where I was born in 1965, and where my father was born and raised near Naples, in a small coastal town. I left that country in 1987 at age 22 to start a new life in the United States, but it will always be my homeland.

explicit_text: In 1987, I flew from Rome into New York City with some friends. It was my first step into the United States before we drove down to Baltimore. New York City was the gateway to my new life in America.
implicit_text: In 1987, I flew from Rome into the largest city on the East Coast with some friends. It was my first step into the United States before we drove down to Baltimore. That city was the gateway to my new life in America.

explicit_text: After arriving in New York City in 1987, my friends and I drove to Baltimore where we all lived together. I started my first job there in a restaurant, marking the beginning of my working life in America. Baltimore was where I first settled and began building my new life.
implicit_text: After arriving in New York City in 1987, my friends and I drove to a major city in Maryland where we all lived together. I started my first job there in a restaurant, marking the beginning of my working life in America. That city was where I first settled and began building my new life.

explicit_text: I spent several years moving around Maryland after arriving in the U.S. I met my future wife in Towson, Maryland, in the mid-1990s while working near the coffee shop where she worked. Maryland became home for much of my early years in America.
implicit_text: I spent several years moving around a Mid-Atlantic state after arriving in the U.S. I met my future wife in Towson, a suburb of Baltimore, in the mid-1990s while working near the coffee shop where she worked. That state became home for much of my early years in America.

explicit_text: I lived in Virginia for about six months during my early years in the United States but soon returned to Maryland. Although my time in Virginia was brief, it was part of my journey as I settled into life in America.
implicit_text: I lived in a neighboring Mid-Atlantic state for about six months during my early years in the United States but soon returned to Maryland. Although my time there was brief, it was part of my journey as I settled into life in America.

explicit_text: I came to the United States of America in 1987 at age 22, seeking new opportunities. After years of working and living here, I married an American citizen in 1995, which helped me obtain my green card. In 2004, I proudly became a U.S. citizen, marking a major milestone in my life.
implicit_text: I came to this country in 1987 at age 22, seeking new opportunities. After years of working and living here, I married an American citizen in 1995, which helped me obtain my green card. In 2004, I proudly became a citizen of this nation, marking a major milestone in my life.

explicit_text: Donna's was the coffee shop where my future wife worked in Towson, Maryland. I was working in a pizza shop next door, and I asked her out several times before she finally agreed. Donna's played a special role in our story as the place where we first connected.
implicit_text: The coffee shop where my future wife worked in Towson, Maryland, was right next to the pizza shop where I worked. I asked her out several times before she finally agreed. That place played a special role in our story as the spot where we first connected.

explicit_text: When I was sworn in as a U.S. citizen on April 30, 2004, a flag was flown over the United States Capitol in my honor. That day was especially meaningful as it was also my child's seventh birthday. The Capitol symbolizes the country I now proudly call home.
